ATTENTION UBLE SHOOTERS. PLEASE REPO! SOURCE OF 
Bot Brains Have you ever ridden in a Cheveolet K car? ‘The ones that talk? “A door is ajar. A door is ajar. Please fasten your seatbelt. Thank you.” There's nothing more annoying. It’s bad enough to have an idiot voice nage: ing you over trivia; imagine how much worse things would be if the voice had intelligence, and even control over the vehicle. Tha’s about how things are in Alpha Complex; many vehicles, especialy the more elaborate mode's frequently issued to Troubleshooters, are equipped with their own bot brains, e, Flybot: Please fasten your seat belt. Troubleshooter: Shut up! Flybot: Hey look, you'te supposed to wear your seat belt Troubleshooter: Shut up, | tell you! Flybot: Well, okay, buddy, I mean, it's your life. ‘Troubleshooter: Okay, we turn eft here, (Turns wheel. Flybot fails to respond) Flybot: Are you sure you want to go left here? Troubleshooter: Yes! Yes, dammit! Do what | tell you! Hlybot: Well, okay: Ifyou insist. (Flybot turns.) (Time passes) Flybot: Should we climb abit or something? Troubleshooter: Huh? Why? (Through the viewscreen looms a huge mountain, shrouded in mist) *Gulp* Why didn’t you tell me we were headed into a mountain? (Wrenches at wheel.) Flybot: You said “left turn,” so | tured left. 1 suggested maybe we should do some- thing else, but no. You were pretty rude about it, too.
